query:
SELECT ap.id, ap.alunoId, a.name, ap.status, ap.macroInicio, ap.macroTermino, t.name as trilha
FROM assessment_pdi ap
JOIN alunos a ON ap.alunoId = a.id
LEFT JOIN trilhas t ON ap.trilhaId = t.id
WHERE a.name LIKE '%Vanessa Bertholdo%'
ORDER BY ap.id;
